docs.title: OVRO-LWA Solar Observation Knowledge-base
docs.text: Welcome to the OVRO-LWA Solar Observation Knowledge-base — a central reference for solar radio observations with the Owens Valley Radio Observatory Long Wavelength Array (OVRO-LWA).

docs.title: About
docs.text: This site documents workflows, data products, calibration procedures, and best practices for solar science with OVRO-LWA.

docs.title: Getting started
docs.text: Use the navigation above to browse topics. Content will be expanded as the knowledge-base grows.

docs.title: Contributing
docs.text: Contributions are welcome. Edit pages directly on GitHub or open a pull request in the repository.
